name: Gralyn Credit Repair Las Vegas
description_short: The Credit Repair Queen LLC offers credit repair, debt reduction, and identity restoration services in North Las Vegas with extended weekday hours and multiple service options.
description_long:
The Credit Repair Queen LLC is a credit repair service operating in North Las Vegas, Nevada, providing consumers with assistance in addressing credit report issues and related financial challenges. The business operates under the trade name and maintains an online booking system via Setmore, indicating a modern, appointment-based service model rather than walk-in only operation.

The company offers a diverse portfolio of services beyond traditional credit repair, including credit repair disputes, debt consolidation, debt reduction, identity restoration, student loan assistance, and debt release services. They also provide general financial services consultation. This broad service menu suggests they position themselves as a comprehensive financial remediation company rather than a single-service credit repair shop.

The business maintains extended operating hours on weekdays (8 AM–9 PM Monday through Friday) and weekend availability (8 AM–5 PM Saturday and Sunday), which accommodates working consumers who cannot easily take daytime appointments. They provide multiple contact channels: phone (702-832-8289), email (repaircredit702@gmail.com), and a separate website (thecreditrepairqueennv.com), suggesting an organized operation with intentional customer communication infrastructure.

However, significant limitations exist. The company has no visible online reviews on their Setmore booking page, making it impossible to verify service quality or consumer satisfaction. Their website provides no detailed information about pricing, specific dispute processes, guaranteed outcomes, compliance with credit repair industry regulations (CROA), or what distinguishes their approach from competitors. The breadth of services claimed (from credit repair to student loans to debt release) may indicate either comprehensive expertise or potential overreach beyond their actual capabilities.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended weekday hours (8 AM–9 PM) accommodate working professionals with scheduling constraints
Weekend availability (8 AM–5 PM Saturday/Sunday) provides access outside standard business hours
Multiple contact methods available: phone, email, and dedicated website for customer communication
Online booking system via Setmore enables appointment scheduling without phone calls
Broad service menu including credit repair, identity restoration, debt reduction, and consolidation
Local North Las Vegas address provides in-person accessibility for Nevada residents
Separate dedicated website (thecreditrepairqueennv.com) suggests established online presence
cons: Zero customer reviews on booking platform make service quality impossible to verify
No pricing information, fee structures, or service packages disclosed on available pages
No published details on CROA compliance, dispute methodology, or consumer protections
Vague service descriptions lack specificity about what 'debt release,' 'finance services,' or other offerings actually entail
No information about company background, experience level, certifications, or regulatory licensing
best_for: North Las Vegas and Las Vegas area residents seeking local, in-person credit repair services
Working professionals needing appointments outside standard 9-5 business hours
Consumers interested in bundled services combining credit repair with debt consolidation and identity protection
diagnosis: The Credit Repair Queen LLC is positioned as a local credit repair and financial remediation service for Las Vegas-area consumers who prefer extended-hours appointments and multi-service financial assistance. The primary caveat is the complete absence of verifiable customer reviews, pricing transparency, and regulatory compliance documentation—making it impossible to assess actual service quality or legitimacy before engagement.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
